notes: Theme refresh ported from the Spanish Trainer app: warm amber accent on layered near-black surfaces, inset-highlight + drop-shadow card depth, subtle radial glow at top, 480px mobile-first column, uppercase 0.08em-tracked card titles, chip-pill secondary buttons, blue accent for transcript follow-along, amber for TTS speaking sentence. Headphones logo recolored to match (yellow-on-dark) and a small logo + subtitle added to the header.
